name: Aloo Mattar Rasedaar
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Potatoes, Cut Into Bite Sized Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the ghee in a pot and sauté the onions and garlic over medium heat until golden.
2. Add the cloves, bay leaves, and cinnamon stick. Stir fry for 2 minutes.
3. Add the garam masala, chili powder, turmeric, coriander, tomatoes, salt, and mix well.
4. Add the potatoes and peas to the pot.
5. Pour in water and bring to a boil.
6. Lower the heat, cover the pot, and simmer for 15 minutes.
7. Serve hot.
